series_metadata.series_description: Formerly FIS-011 (019-0011). This record is an internal form used to document the Motion, Entry, and Certification forms which were returned to the county for a given month, and to show the number which are to be paid. The Monthly Batch Sheet is kept on

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current fiscal year next most recent fiscal year . Remove older records off-site storage two years
